calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-20-17 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-DEC-20-2017:
Daniel J. Schwartz and Kimberly E. Miller, Plaintiffs / Appellants;
Joseph Romond and Jennifer Holm, Defendants / Respondents

This cause is assigned this day by the Presiding Judge in Department 206 for a trial de novo. All litigants and witness(es) are administered the witness oath.

Witness Tyler Gosnell, who was previously sworn, testifies on behalf of the plaintiffs, appellants.

Plaintiff Mr. Schwartz testifies on his own behalf.

Defendant Mr. Romond testifies on his own behalf and submits the following exhibits (which are not marked):
- Photo stills: Truck backing up to garage door; interior of garage door
- Bill from R&S Erection Company
- Report from Kevin Moylan
- Officer Moylan's letter
- Receipts from filings

Rebuttal testimony by Mr. Schwartz who also submits the following exhibit:
- Photo

Final arguments by Mr. Romond and Mr. Schwartz.

Mr. Romond requests the Court to review Respondents' Motion to Strike Appellants' Request for Continuance and Declaration, filed on December 5, 2017, and a summarized list of costs prior to the Court's decision.

The Court takes this matter under submission. Court adjourns.

Judge: Hon. Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings not reported; Dept. 504.
